name: Aurora Crown Commune
identity: Largest Sheresh dome commune, where survival administration, celestial study, and public endurance ritual converge.
approach: Blue-white dome glow, layered ice walls, and guarded thermal inlets announce a commune built to keep life possible.
inside: Maintenance galleries, ration courts, aurora study halls, and tightly managed warm corridors structure daily motion.
expected_behavior: report cracks, contamination, and supply irregularities immediately
faith: aurora and survival observance remain communal rather than triumphal
seasonal_change: Axial shifts, blizzards, and thaw windows alter dome strain and movement schedules.

sensory_surface.detail: Blue-white dome glow, layered ice walls, and guarded thermal inlets announce a commune built to keep life possible.

social_expectation_surface.detail: report cracks, contamination, and supply irregularities immediately

public_behavior_texture: People who belong here are usually dome stewards, researchers, craft workers, and public conduct is read through expectations such as respect dome protocols, report cracks, contamination, and supply irregularities immediately.
visible_power_signals: Ordinary decisions are visibly shaped by Sheresh Dome Stewards, Containment Research Concord.
local_tension_surface: The place feels stable only until pressures such as dome stress, contamination seepage, ration balancing begin showing through daily routines.
differentiator: Aurora Crown Commune stands apart because its economy leans on protective craftwork, calibration tools; public faith remains visible through aurora and survival observance remain communal rather than triumphal; outsiders are noticed fastest when they resemble wasteful outsiders, those ignoring contamination checks.
encounter_rhythm: Most first scenes in Aurora Crown Commune begin through major dome commune rhythms: arrival, observation, minor correction, and only then deeper access.
scene_openers: A first arrival at Aurora Crown Commune immediately highlights largest sheresh dome commune, where survival administration, celestial study, and public endurance ritual converge

arrival_variants_by_time.dawn: At dawn, Aurora Crown Commune feels procedural and watchful as daily rhythms set.
arrival_variants_by_time.midday: By midday, Aurora Crown Commune is busiest and least forgiving of confusion.
arrival_variants_by_time.night: At night, Aurora Crown Commune reveals who really moves after formal structures thin out.

recent_local_change_signal: Locals in Aurora Crown Commune mention that something small but important has changed in the last few weeks, even if they refuse to name it directly.
